heading: Persons subject to military commissions
label: 948c Persons subject to military commissions
text: Any alien unprivileged enemy belligerent is subject to trial by military commission as set forth in this chapter.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 948c, added , , , related to persons subject to military commissions, prior to the general amendment of this chapter by .Pub. L. 109–366, § 3(a)(1)120 Stat. 2602Pub. L. 111–84Oct. 17, 2006
